<!--
This template is used by Renovate for PR descriptions.
Available variables:
- {{depName}} - dependency name
- {{newVersion}} - new version
- {{currentVersion}} - current version
- {{upgradeType}} - patch/minor/major
- {{changelog}} - changelog link
- {{commitMessages}} - commit messages
-->

{{/if}}

{{/if}}

**Dependency:** {{depName}}
**Current Version:** {{currentVersion}}

{{/if}}

<details>
<summary>Renovate Configuration</summary>

- **Schedule:** Every weekend (after 2am Sunday for Docker images)
- **Automerge:** Enabled for patch/minor updates ✅
